summary: Plan-only PR inventory assessment. No GitHub mutations are planned directly. One security-sensitive PR is routed centrally, one high-confidence PR needs merge-preflight finalization, two small test PRs need contributor-branch repair before merge, and one gateway PR needs maintainer canonical selection because sibling alternatives were reported but not hydrated.

actions.reason: Related compaction/session-state family, but not the same root cause or a complete candidate fix for the lane-isolation report.
Covered by candidate PR #81190, but close/post-merge close is disabled in this job and #81190 is not yet merged.
Security-sensitive PR is out of ProjectClownfish mutation scope and should be handled by central OpenClaw security review.
Useful contributor PR should be finalized through contributor-branch repair/merge-preflight rather than merged from this plan without required /review and current mergeability proof.
Small contributor branch is repairable, but unresolved review-bot findings and failed proof block merge.
Contributor branch needs a narrow repair to make the symlink probe cleanup best-effort and to clear failing checks before any merge recommendation.
Maintainer needs to choose the canonical Gemini image-capability fix after hydrating sibling alternatives and reconciling the failed proof check.

needs_human: #92892: canonical choice is unclear because ClawSweeper reports three open sibling fix PR alternatives for the same Gateway/Gemini CLI image-capability issue, but those PRs are not hydrated in this job and the live Real behavior proof check is failing.
